headline: Marvell Stock And The Multi-Year Bet Management Made
summary: After a monster run, executives are promising accelerating growth for years to come, forcing investors to decide if the best gains are already in the rearview mirror.

headline: Jefferies Maintains Hold on Globe Life, Raises Price Target to $166
summary: Jefferies  analyst Suneet Kamath   maintains Globe Life (NYSE:GL) with a Hold and raises the price target from $147 to $166.

headline: Zacks.com featured highlights include Ross Stores, Suzano, Bilbao Vizcaya Argentaria, Globe Life and AMETEK
summary: High-ROE stocks are in focus as market volatility rises, with five companies highlighted for profitability, earnings growth or consistent performance.
